changes.value:
The test file `src/components/fields/editors/editor-save.test.tsx` fails to run because `js-yaml` is not installed as a dependency.

Error: `Failed to resolve import "js-yaml" from "src/components/fields/editors/editor-save.test.tsx". Does the file exist?`

Fix: run `npm install js-yaml` (or `npm install --save-dev js-yaml`) in `/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer-kanban/kanban-app/ui`.
Fix missing js-yaml dependency in editor-save.test.tsx
